assertions.assertion: An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.read' scope is defined using RequireClaim
An authorization policy requiring the 'catalog.write' scope is defined using RequireClaim
The GET /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the read policy
The POST /products endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() referencing the write policy
builder.Services.AddAuthorization is called to register the policies
assertions.rationale: builder.Services.AddAuthorization(options => { ... }) is called to register both policies.
